items.before: Terminal custom key handling only treats metaKey/Cmd as the shortcut modifier, so Windows users lack keyboard font-size shortcuts and Ctrl+Shift+C/V terminal copy/paste handling.
items.after: Update the xterm.js custom key handler so non-macOS uses Ctrl for font-size shortcuts and supports Ctrl+Shift+C/V for terminal copy/paste while preserving macOS Cmd behavior. Guard against AltGr (require !ev.altKey) and only intercept Ctrl+Shift+C / Ctrl+Shift+V (leave plain Ctrl+C interrupt and plain Ctrl+V untouched).
